sentence: Tú sabes que el zorro azul corre por el patio.
ipa: tu saβeh ke el soro asul kore poɾ el patjo
gloss_en: You know the blue fox runs across the yard.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; strong-R trill [r]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. Panamanian tuteo (sabes) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Toma los mangos y ven para la casa.
ipa: toma loh manɡoh i beŋ paɾa la kasa
gloss_en: Take the mangoes and come home.
notes: coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. tuteo imperatives (toma, ven) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: El pelao tiene un perro grande y bravo.
ipa: el pelao tjene uŋ pero ɡɾande i bɾabo
gloss_en: The kid has a big, fierce dog.
notes: tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; strong-R trill [r]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. Panamanian 'pelao' for a child per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Mañana el niño juega en la plaza contigo.
ipa: maɲana el niɲo xweɣa eŋ la plasa kontiɣo
gloss_en: Tomorrow the boy plays in the square with you.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. tuteo (contigo) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: La calle está llena de gente joven.
ipa: la kaʝe esta ʝena de xente xobeŋ
gloss_en: The street is full of young people.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general Panamanian usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: ¿Quieres arroz con pollo o prefieres carne guisada?
ipa: kjeɾeh aros koŋ poʝo o pɾefjeɾeh kaɾne ɡisaða
gloss_en: Do you want rice with chicken or stewed meat?
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; strong-R trill [r]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. tuteo (quieres, prefieres) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Busca unos zapatos nuevos en aquel mercado.
ipa: buska unoh sapatoh nweboh eŋ akel meɾkaðo
gloss_en: Look for some new shoes in that market.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. tuteo imperative (busca) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: La lluvia cae fuerte sobre los tejados viejos.
ipa: la ʝubja kae fweɾte sobɾe loh texaðoh bjexoh
gloss_en: The rain falls hard on the old roofs.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Nosotros queremos una casa buena y barata.
ipa: nosotɾoh keɾemoh una kasa bwena i baɾata
gloss_en: We want a good, cheap house.
notes: coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: El camión rojo corre rápido por la carretera.
ipa: el kamioŋ roxo kore rapiðo poɾ la kareteɾa
gloss_en: The red truck runs fast along the highway.
notes: final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; strong-R trill [r] per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Ese señor tiene bastante tierra en la montaña.
ipa: ese seɲoɾ tjene bastante tjera eŋ la montaɲa
gloss_en: That man has plenty of land on the mountain.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; strong-R trill [r]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: No vayas solo, anda con los muchachos.
ipa: no baʝah solo anda koŋ loh mutʃatʃoh
gloss_en: Don't go alone, go with the guys.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. tuteo negative imperative (vayas, anda) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Las manzanas y las naranjas están en la mesa.
ipa: lah mansanah i lah naɾanxah estaŋ eŋ la mesa
gloss_en: The apples and oranges are on the table.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: ¿Tú vives lejos del parque nuevo?
ipa: tu bibeh lexoh del paɾke nwebo
gloss_en: Do you live far from the new park?
notes: coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. tuteo (vives) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Los caballos blancos pastan junto al arroyo.
ipa: loh kaβaʝoh blankoh pastaŋ xunto al aroʝo
gloss_en: The white horses graze by the stream.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; strong-R trill [r]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Compra pan y guarda un poco para después.
ipa: kompɾa paŋ i ɡaɾda uŋ poko paɾa despueh
gloss_en: Buy bread and save some for later.
notes: coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. tuteo imperatives (compra, guarda) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Esos zapatos viejos ya no sirven para nada.
ipa: esoh sapatoh bjexoh ʝa no siɾbeŋ paɾa naða
gloss_en: Those old shoes are no good for anything anymore.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Aquella niña baila con mucha alegría.
ipa: akeʝa niɲa bajla koŋ mutʃa aleɡɾia
gloss_en: That girl dances with great joy.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; final /n/ velarised to [ŋ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: Tienes que llamar a tus amigos temprano.
ipa: tjeneh ke ʝamaɾ a tuh amiɣoh tempɾano
gloss_en: You have to call your friends early.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ aspirated to [h]; tonic diphthong ⟨ie/ue⟩ [je we]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. tuteo (tienes) per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.

sentence: El sol brilla sobre el mar azul y tranquilo.
ipa: el sol bɾiʝa sobɾe el maɾ asul i tɾankilo
gloss_en: The sun shines over the blue, calm sea.
notes: seseo ⟨c/z⟩ merged to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; cross-word sandhi junction per hualde2005. general usage per fontanella_de_weinberg1992.
